arts.sum: John Mousinho has won 43 times in the 93 matches he's overseen as Pompey boss.

arts.sum: Pompey’s owners have been tasked to ‘properly’ back John Mousinho and Rich Hughes in the January transfer window.

arts.sum: The ex-Portsmouth, Reading and Leeds United forward is expected to be handed a first permanent managerial role

arts.ttl: Predicted Portsmouth XI & bench for Bristol City as injuries continue to take their toll
arts.sum: Pompey welcome Bristol City to Fratton Park on Saturday for the first league meeting between the two sides since 2012.

arts.ttl: Why Portsmouth fan favourite won't make Fratton Park return with Bristol City
arts.sum: Pompey take on Bristol City at Fratton Park in the Sky Bet Championship but we won’t be seeing a title winning hero.

arts.ttl: 2,1717 Bristol City fans advised of rare red weather warning for deaprture to Portsmouth Fratton Park
arts.sum: Bristol City fans heading to Fratton Park on Saturday for their Championship fixture against Pompey are advised to take note of the latest weather warning emerging from the Met Office.

arts.ttl: ‘Signs of improvement’ – Portsmouth vs Bristol City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Portsmouth vs Bristol City prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Saturday. The post ‘Signs of improvement’ – Portsmouth vs Bristol City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: John Mousinho confirms 'huge' Portsmouth injury blow ahead of Bristol City clash at Fratton Park
arts.sum: Portsmouth manager John Mousinho has confirmed his side have suffered a "huge blow" ahead of their clash with Bristol City at Fratton Park, with Kusini Yengi ruled out for the next nine to 10 weeks through injury. Mousinho's side are unbeaten in their last two games and impressed against Preston North End last time out at Fratton Park, but they will have to do without Yengi for the foreseeable future after the attacker picked up a new injury whilst he was away with Australia during the international break.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss’ message as threat of losing outstanding Callum Lang hangs over Bristol City and Norwich City
arts.sum: Callum Lang has been told not to temper his aggressive approach as he walks a Pompey disciplinary tightrope.

arts.ttl: Storm Darragh: Portsmouth FC give update over match with Bristol City after 'danger to life' weather warning
arts.sum: The Met Office has warned of “danger to life” and “falling trees” with a Portsmouth Christmas market already paying the price for Storm Darragh on Saturday.
